zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Valletort於1203年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾維斯特波利時，她的父親Roger de Valletort38歲，母親Alesia de Columbieres54歲。她於1218年與Thomas de Corbet在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭戴文哈波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Valletort于1203年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾維斯特波利时，她的父亲Roger de Valletort38岁，母亲Alesia de Columbieres54岁。她于1218年与Thomas de Corbet在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰戴文哈波頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Valletort was born in 1203, in Westbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Valletort, was 38 and her mother, Alesia de Columbieres, was 54. She married Thomas de Corbet in 1218, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. She died in Harberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Valletort est née en 1203, à Westbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Valletort, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Alesia de Columbieres, avait 54 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Corbet en 1218, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée à Harberton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Valletort 1203 in Westbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Valletort 38 und ihre Mutter Alesia de Columbieres 54. Sie hat 1218 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas de Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb in Harberton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Valletort è nata il nel 1203 nel Westbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Roger de Valletort, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Alesia de Columbieres, aveva 54 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Corbet nel 1218, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel Harberton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Valletortが1203年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエストブリーで生まれた時，父Roger de Valletortは38歳，母Alesia de Columbieresは54歳であった。1218年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでThomas de Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスデボンハーバートンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Valletort(이)가 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 웨스트버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Valletort(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alesia de Columbieres(은)는 54세였다. 그녀는 1218년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Thomas de Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 하르버턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Valletort nasceu em 1203, em Westbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Valletort, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Alesia de Columbieres, tinha 54 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Corbet em 1218, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Valletort родилась в 1203 г. в местности вестбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Valletort было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Alesia de Columbieres, 54. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Corbet в 1218 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в местности харбиртон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Valletort nació en 1203, en Westbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Valletort, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Alesia de Columbieres, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Thomas de Corbet en 1218, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en Harberton, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
